final:
// // Asynchronous reset functionality: Output follows data input on clock edge when reset is high
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input d,
    input rst,
    output reg q
);always @(posedge clk, negedge rst) begin
        if (~rst) begin
            q <= 1'b0;
        end else begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // Asynchronous reset functionality: Output follows data input on clock edge when reset is high
